articles.title: ARC Raiders Riven Tides countdown: Exact date and time
articles.description: Riven Tides is coming soon to ARC Raiders as the next major update, and it will feature a brand-new map, among other things. Embark has already confirmed the date earlier this month, and this guide will help you keep track of when the update goes live. With plenty of exciting additions, you certainly won't want to miss this update. Table of contents ARC Raiders Riven Tides countdown What to expect from Riven Tides in ARC Raiders ARC Raiders Riven Tides countdown Riven Tides goes live worldwide on Tuesday, April 28. Embark has followed the same routine for all major updates (releasing them on the last Tuesday of every month), and the following countdown will expire when the new map goes live. [hurrytimer id="1209445"] The countdown is based on the following timings. 2am PT 4am CT 5am ET 9am UTC 10am CET This is based on when the previous major updates have dropped in the game. Any last-minute change will be duly updated on this guide. What to expect from Riven Tides in ARC Raiders AThe major highlight of the new patch is the map. For the first time since launch, we will have a new map in ARC Raiders . Embark has slightly teased at the buildings that will be present on the map. We will have to wait until Tuesday to get a full blast of the new Topside experience. Riven Tides will also feature a big ARC enemy, which we haven't seen since the release of the Matriarch. Whether it will be part of a new map event remains to be seen at this point of time. We should also get new weapons and items to take on this threat. Last but not least, look out for new quests that should have extra rewards. As always, we will detailed guides for all of them. A new Expedition window will also be active for those who want to experience the endgame. Joining the expedition will reset your inventory, but you'll get rewards like cosmetics and extra slots to store your loot. The post ARC Raiders Riven Tides countdown: Exact date and time appeared first on Destructoid .
